content:
My app is expo go native with 400 deploy, FINAL PRODUCTION CLOSEOUT — LANDING PAGE + REELS + BACKEND + ANDROID

Current verified state:

- Local Git SHA = ebc3181a6deb4791701a4dfb3d67cb9eefa46353
- GitHub HEAD SHA = ebc3181a6deb4791701a4dfb3d67cb9eefa46353
- Production backend SHA = ebc3181a6deb4791701a4dfb3d67cb9eefa46353
- Git synchronization problem = resolved
- Backend deployment chain = aligned

DO NOT stop at backend verification.

The task is only complete when:

1. Backend is live
2. Landing page is live
3. Reels work without crashing
4. Registration reaches Members/Admin HQ
5. Android app is rebuilt and tested
6. Production evidence is complete

==================================================
1. VERIFY FRONTEND RELEASE
==================================================

Identify the exact frontend commit currently served by:

- https://ivxholding.com
- https://www.ivxholding.com
- https://chat.ivxholding.com

Return:

- frontend GitHub SHA
- deployed frontend SHA
- deployment ID
- deployment timestamp
- S3 object version or deployment marker
- CloudFront distribution ID
- CloudFront invalidation ID
- cache status
- HTML build marker

If the frontend does not match:

ebc3181a6deb4791701a4dfb3d67cb9eefa46353

then:

1. Build the production frontend.
2. Upload the correct static assets.
3. Publish the correct HTML.
4. Invalidate CloudFront.
5. Remove stale bundles.
6. Verify the live domain again.

Do not claim deployment from a local build or uploaded artifact.
Verify the public production domain.

==================================================
2. VERIFY WWW REDIRECT
==================================================

Verify:

https://www.ivxholding.com

must redirect permanently to:

https://ivxholding.com

Required result:

- HTTP 301 or 308
- exact canonical destination
- no redirect loop
- no duplicate page
- no separate cached version

Return the actual response headers.

==================================================
3. VERIFY ALL PRODUCTION API ROUTES
==================================================

Test live production endpoints:

- GET /health
- GET /readiness
- GET /version
- GET /diagnostics
- GET /api/reels
- GET /api/reels/:id
- GET /api/properties
- GET /api/properties/:id
- GET /api/deals
- GET /api/deals/:id
- GET /api/members/authoritative-count
- GET /api/metrics/authoritative-count
- GET /api/trpc/waitlist.getStats
- registration endpoint
- owner login endpoint
- Admin HQ members endpoint
- chat rooms endpoint
- chat messages endpoint

For every route return:

ROUTE | STATUS | CONTENT-TYPE | RESPONSE TYPE | PASS/FAIL

Rules:

- API routes must return JSON.
- API routes must not return landing-page HTML.
- Public routes must not require owner authentication.
- Protected routes must return 401 without auth.
- No expected route may return 404.

==================================================
4. COMPLETE REELS CRASH REFACTOR
==================================================

The reels module is not complete until it passes real stability testing.

Required architecture:

- exactly 1 active video player
- maximum 3 mounted video players
- previous, current and next only
- all other reels use posters
- stable reel IDs
- no index keys
- cursor pagination
- no nested vertical ScrollView
- pause on route blur
- pause when app enters background
- release distant players
- one failed reel must not crash the feed
- no duplicate audio
- no expired media URLs
- no full-feed rerender after like/comment
- no black media container
- fixed aspect ratio
- poster before playback

Verify landing page and mobile use the same canonical media IDs.

Required reel functions:

- play
- pause
- mute
- unmute
- swipe next
- swipe previous
- replay
- like
- unlike
- comment
- share
- save
- open related property
- return to same reel

==================================================
5. LANDING PAGE END-TO-END QA
==================================================

Run QA on the real production domain.

Test:

- Android Chrome
- iPhone Safari viewport
- tablet viewport
- desktop Chrome
- desktop Safari-compatible viewport

Verify:

- no page jumping
- no scroll reset
- no white banner
- no black blank sections
- no horizontal overflow
- no image layout shift
- no reel layout shift
- no multiple autoplay videos
- every CTA works
- every navigation item works
- all property cards open
- all deal cards open
- reels display and play
- registration opens
- login opens
- browser back works
- page remains stable after reload

Capture:

- full-page screenshots
- one continuous mobile screen recording
- one desktop screen recording
- console logs
- network logs

==================================================
6. REGISTRATION AND MEMBER SYNC
==================================================

Create one controlled QA member through the live public registration flow.

Verify all stages:

1. Supabase Auth user created.
2. Member profile created.
3. Required fields stored.
4. No duplicate member created.
5. Member appears in Members module.
6. Member appears in Admin HQ.
7. Owner can open the member record.
8. Same user ID is used across all records.
9. QA member is removed or labeled after verification.

Return:

- QA user ID
- member ID
- creation timestamp
- Members module evidence
- Admin HQ evidence
- cleanup result

Do not expose password or private credentials.

==================================================
7. OWNER LOGIN AND ADMIN HQ
==================================================

Verify with the existing configured owner account:

- owner login works
- non-owner cannot access owner routes
- owner allowlist works
- Admin HQ opens
- Members opens
- Investors opens
- CRM opens
- Chat opens
- Variables opens
- Owner AI opens
- logout works
- session survives refresh where intended
- unauthorized session returns 401/403, not 200

Do not ask the owner for credentials unless the real authentication request returns 401/403 because the stored credential is invalid, expired, revoked or missing.

==================================================
8. BUILD FRESH ANDROID APK
==================================================

Do not rely on the old Expo update.

Create a fresh Android build from the synchronized commit:

ebc3181a6deb4791701a4dfb3d67cb9eefa46353

Required actions:

1. Verify Expo project ID.
2. Verify Android package.
3. Verify runtimeVersion.
4. Increment versionCode.
5. Clear build cache.
6. Build a fresh APK.
7. Verify embedded bundle exists.
8. Install on a clean Android device.
9. Open first in airplane mode.
10. Open with Wi-Fi.
11. Open with cellular data.
12. Cold restart three times.
13. Open Reels.
14. Swipe 50 reels.
15. Run a 30-minute session.
16. Verify no crash.
17. Verify no remote update download fatal error.
18. Verify owner login.
19. Verify chat.
20. Verify landing/reels data sync.

Required proof:

- EAS build ID
- APK URL
- versionCode
- runtimeVersion
- build timestamp
- installed app screenshot
- offline launch result
- online launch result
- adb logcat result
- 50-swipe result
- 30-minute result

==================================================
9. DEPLOYMENT ALIGNMENT
==================================================

All release components must be aligned.

Return:

COMPONENT | SHA | DEPLOYMENT ID | TIMESTAMP | PASS/FAIL

Components:

- Local Git
- GitHub
- Backend Render
- Landing page frontend
- Chat frontend
- Reels API
- Android APK

Rules:

- Local Git SHA must equal GitHub SHA.
- GitHub SHA must equal backend production SHA.
- Frontend build must come from the same approved release.
- Android APK must be built from the same approved release.
- No component may remain on a stale commit.

==================================================
10. FINAL AUTONOMOUS EXECUTION RULE
==================================================

Do not stop after reporting a blocker.

For each failure:

1. Capture exact error.
2. Identify root cause.
3. Fix the responsible code/configuration.
4. Commit.
5. Push.
6. Deploy.
7. Purge cache if needed.
8. Retest.
9. Retry transient failures up to 3 times.
10. Continue to the next step only after pass.

Only request owner action when a real verified blocker exists, such as:

- 401
- 403
- revoked credential
- expired credential
- missing provider permission
- physical-device acceptance after all automated tests pass

When owner action is required, send:

- IVX IA chat message
- push notification
- exact blocker
- exact action
- trace ID
- resume status

Resume automatically after the owner action is completed.

==================================================
11. FINAL EVIDENCE TABLE
==================================================

Return only this table:

ITEM | EXPECTED | ACTUAL | PASS/FAIL | EVIDENCE

Include:

1. Local Git SHA
2. GitHub SHA
3. Backend SHA
4. Frontend SHA
5. Chat frontend SHA
6. Deployment IDs
7. Production URLs
8. CloudFront invalidation
9. www redirect
10. API route results
11. Reels API result
12. Reels crash result
13. Active player count
14. Mounted player count
15. Landing page jump result
16. Mobile layout result
17. Registration result
18. Members sync result
19. Admin HQ sync result
20. Owner login result
21. Android APK build
22. Android offline launch
23. Android online launch
24. 50-swipe test
25. 30-minute reels test
26. Console errors
27. Network errors
28. Screenshots
29. Screen recordings
30. Remaining blocker

==================================================
FINAL STATUS RULE
==================================================

Do not use:

COMPLETE
FIXED
DEPLOYED
VERIFIED
CERTIFIED
PRODUCTION READY

until all of these are true:

- frontend is live on the latest release
- backend is live on the latest release
- www redirect works
- all required API routes pass
- reels no longer crashes
- landing page is stable
- QA member reaches Admin HQ
- owner login works
- fresh Android APK is built
- Android launches offline and online
- 50 reel swipes pass
- 30-minute test passes
- all SHAs are aligned
- evidence is attached

CURRENT STATUS:

BACKEND SYNC = PASS
GITHUB SYNC = PASS
FRONTEND RELEASE = UNVERIFIED
LANDING PAGE QA = INCOMPLETE
REELS QA = INCOMPLETE
ANDROID APK = NOT VERIFIED
FINAL RELEASE = STILL OPEN

EXECUTE THE REMAINING WORK NOW.
